scripts.quality:all: pnpm run quality:lint && pnpm run quality:type && pnpm run quality:deps && pnpm run quality:circular && pnpm run quality:size && pnpm run quality:components && pnpm run quality:types-location && pnpm run quality:pkg-json && pnpm run quality:dead && pnpm run quality:publint && pnpm run quality:attw && pnpm run quality:py:ruff && pnpm run quality:py:mypy && pnpm run quality:py:interrogate && pnpm run quality:py:xenon
scripts.quality:circular: madge --circular --extensions ts,tsx apps/web/src apps/mobile/src apps/desktop/src apps/bots libs/shared/ts/src packages/cli/src
scripts.quality:py:interrogate: uvx interrogate -c pyproject.toml apps/api apps/voice-agent libs/shared/py
scripts.quality:py:mypy: uv run --project apps/api --group backend --group dev mypy apps/api/app apps/voice-agent/src libs/shared/py --ignore-missing-imports
scripts.quality:py:ruff: uvx ruff check apps/api apps/voice-agent libs/shared/py
scripts.quality:py:xenon: uvx xenon --max-absolute F --max-modules E --max-average B apps/api apps/voice-agent libs/shared/py -e 'apps/api/tests/**' -e 'apps/api/scripts/**' -e 'libs/shared/py/tests/**'
scripts.quality:type-coverage: pnpm run quality:type-coverage:web && pnpm run quality:type-coverage:desktop && pnpm run quality:type-coverage:mobile && pnpm run quality:type-coverage:cli && pnpm run quality:type-coverage:shared && pnpm run quality:type-coverage:bots
scripts.quality:type-coverage:bots: type-coverage --project apps/bots/discord/tsconfig.json --at-least 99 --ignore-catch --ignore-unread && type-coverage --project apps/bots/slack/tsconfig.json --at-least 99 --ignore-catch --ignore-unread && type-coverage --project apps/bots/telegram/tsconfig.json --at-least 99 --ignore-catch --ignore-unread && type-coverage --project apps/bots/whatsapp/tsconfig.json --at-least 99 --ignore-catch --ignore-unread
scripts.tokens: pnpm run tokens:export && pnpm run tokens:build
scripts.tokens:check: design.md export --format dtcg DESIGN.md | diff - config/design.tokens.json
